issues.description: Feature 'seller-admins' imports directly from feature 'auth' (useSupabaseAuth) and feature 'products' (useProductById). Cross-feature imports in presentation pages should go through a shared abstraction or the shared layer.
issues.rule: Features MUST NOT import directly from other features. Cross-feature communication should go through shared interfaces in /shared/domain/, global stores, or event patterns.
issues.fix: Move useSupabaseAuth to shared/application/hooks (it is imported by multiple features across the app). Extract the product data fetch to a prop or composition at the page/app router level.

issues.description: Feature 'seller-admins' imports 'useSupabaseAuth' directly from feature 'auth'. This couples two domain features at the presentation layer.
issues.fix: Move useSupabaseAuth (or a generic useCurrentUser hook) to apps/studio/src/shared/application/hooks.

issues.description: Feature 'seller-admins' imports 'useSupabaseAuth' directly from feature 'auth'. Same violation as ARCH-001/002.
issues.fix: Move useSupabaseAuth to shared/application/hooks (used by 3+ presentation files in seller-admins alone, plus products feature).

issues.description: Feature 'products' imports from three other features: 'auth' (useSupabaseAuth), 'orders' (usePendingOrderCount), and 'seller-admins' (useDelegateCountsByProduct). This page aggregates cross-feature data at the feature presentation layer instead of at the app router or shared level.
issues.rule: Cross-feature imports violate feature isolation. Page-level orchestration of multiple features belongs at the app router level or through shared context.
issues.fix: Extract the cross-feature data fetching (pendingCount, delegateCounts) to the app router page wrapper or a shared dashboard context, and pass them as props to ProductListPage. Move useSupabaseAuth to shared.

issues.description: Feature 'users' imports 'useLogExport' from feature 'audit'. The audit export functionality is coupled into the users presentation layer.
issues.rule: Features MUST NOT import directly from other features.
issues.fix: Either move the export feature to shared, or pass the log export handler as a prop from the app router page down to UsersPageContent.

issues.description: The route file defines local types (PaymentMethodRow, ProductStockRow, PermissionRow, CheckoutItemPayload) inline. These are internal DB row shapes used only within this route, so this is a minor issue. However, if these shapes are reused across routes, they should be extracted.
issues.note: This is acceptable if the types are strictly internal to this route. The CheckoutItemPayload type particularly might be worth extracting to the checkout domain if it represents a domain concept.
issues.rule: Complex types used across files MUST be in domain/types. Single-file internal types are acceptable.
issues.fix: Consider extracting CheckoutItemPayload to apps/payments/src/features/checkout/domain/types.ts if it represents a checkout domain concept reused elsewhere.

issues.description: Local row types (PaymentMethodRow, OrderRow) defined inline in the route. These are internal-only shapes for direct DB access. Acceptable for now but worth monitoring if they grow.
issues.rule: Minor: single-use types local to one file are acceptable.
issues.fix: No action needed unless these types are reused in other files.

patterns.description: App Router thin wrapper pattern is consistently followed across all apps. Route page.tsx files only call setRequestLocale and render the feature page component — no business logic in routes.
Clean layer dependency direction is respected in 95%+ of cases. Application layer imports infrastructure, infrastructure imports domain — no backward dependencies found.
Shared code policies are followed: receiptStorage is in shared/infrastructure because it is used by 3 features (checkout, orders, received-orders) in payments app.

useSupabaseAuth from the 'auth' feature is imported by 3+ files in the 'seller-admins' and 'products' features (apps/studio). This hook is a prime candidate for promotion to shared/application/hooks to eliminate all these cross-feature imports in one move.
patterns.recommendation: Move useSupabaseAuth to apps/studio/src/shared/application/hooks/useSupabaseAuth.ts (or use the auth/client from packages/auth if it provides equivalent functionality).

patterns.description: No hardcoded production URLs found in source files. All URLs are either localhost references in config/tests (acceptable), environment variable reads, or example.com strings in test mocks.
patterns.note: SUPABASE_LOCAL_URL fallback hardcoded to http://127.0.0.1:54321 in admin/environment.ts and studio/next.config.ts — this is a safe local dev fallback, not a production concern.
